## [12:10 - 15:13]

The reason I call it support is because people, it's basically support-based objections are they're worried that people close to them, be it a partner or a spouse or whoever, isn't going to support them with that decision, okay? There's I have made the decision, I know this is the right thing, now is the right time, and I'm going to do it, I just need to let them know out of respect.
